mcq.question: Which of these is a main component of the CPU?
What does the ALU do?
mcq.correct: Carries out arithmetic and logical operations
wrong: Connects the computer to a network

mcq.question: What is the role of the control unit?
What are registers?
mcq.correct: Very small, fast memory locations in the CPU

mcq.question: Why is cache memory useful?
mcq.correct: It is faster for the CPU to access than RAM
wrong: It holds the computer case together
